mapper.sql: select r.id AS roadwayId,r.roadway,a.drilling_location,a.borehole_code,a.group_no,a.borehole_no,a.borehole_length as borehole_length,p.id, p.borehole_id, p.gas_concentration, p.negative_pressure, p.estimated_time_drainage_done, p.measure_date, p.beginningcon, p.measurer, p.tabulator, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark,pb.purpose_borehole from t_drainage_parameter p LEFT JOIN t_bk_act_borehole_info a ON a.id=p.borehole_id LEFT JOIN t_roadway r ON r.id = a.roadway_id LEFT JOIN t_purpose_borehole pb ON pb.id = a.purpose_borehole_id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_drainage_parameter
borehole_id, gas_concentration, negative_pressure, estimated_time_drainage_done, measure_date, beginningcon, beginningcon_date, measurer, tabulator, create_by, update_by, update_time, remark, create_time
#{boreholeId}, #{gasConcentration}, #{negativePressure}, #{estimatedTimeDrainageDone}, #{measureDate}, #{beginningcon}, #{beginningconDate}, #{measurer}, #{tabulator}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
NOW() datetime('now', 'localtime')
mapper.update:
update t_drainage_parameter
borehole_id = #{boreholeId}, gas_concentration = #{gasConcentration}, negative_pressure = #{negativePressure}, estimated_time_drainage_done = #{estimatedTimeDrainageDone}, measure_date = #{measureDate}, beginningcon = #{beginningcon}, beginningcon_date = #{beginningconDate}, measurer = #{measurer}, tabulator = #{tabulator}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time =
NOW() datetime('now', 'localtime')
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_drainage_parameter where id in
#{id}

delete from t_drainage_parameter where borehole_id in
#{boreholeIds}
mapper.select: select r.roadway,a.* from t_bk_act_borehole_info a LEFT JOIN t_roadway r ON r.id= a.roadway_id where a.id NOT IN (SELECT borehole_id from t_drainage_parameter)
select beginningcon_date from t_drainage_parameter where borehole_id =#{boreholeId} and beginningcon is true
select id from t_drainage_parameter where borehole_id =#{boreholeId} and beginningcon is true
